projectMetadata.projectName: Lutheran Community Services Northwest Tri-Cities Office Expansion

executiveSummary: MH Construction served as general contractor for the Lutheran Community Services Northwest Tri-Cities Office Expansion in Kennewick, Washington. The project converted a former call center into a 38,000-square-foot youth mental and behavioral health facility, consolidating two Kennewick offices and adding purpose-built trauma-informed space for counseling, therapy, training, staff support, and food assistance.
clientBackground: Lutheran Community Services Northwest serves individuals, families, and communities across Washington, Oregon, and Idaho. The Tri-Cities district focuses heavily on youth mental and behavioral health and required expanded, consolidated space to meet demand.
challenge: LCSNW reported capacity pressure at existing offices and needed consolidated operations with specialized counseling and therapy environments. The selected former call-center site required complete interior transformation.
scopeOfWork: 38,000-square-foot interior commercial remodel and adaptive reuse
Construction of eight conference rooms and three staff break rooms
Build-out of specialized play therapy, teen, and training rooms
Installation of commercial plumbing, mechanical, and HVAC systems
Installation of flooring, cabinetry, and interior finishes

timelineAndMilestones.name: Project Kickoff
timelineAndMilestones.note: Demolition officially underway at the Canal Drive site.

timelineAndMilestones.name: Interior Framing
timelineAndMilestones.note: Drywall, painting, and ceiling installation progressing.

timelineAndMilestones.name: Client Endorsement
timelineAndMilestones.note: LCSNW publicly acknowledged MH Construction for site transformation.

timelineAndMilestones.name: Interior Finishes
timelineAndMilestones.note: Cabinetry installation and paint application progressed.

timelineAndMilestones.name: Flooring Installation
timelineAndMilestones.note: Carpet and hard-surface flooring installation completed.

timelineAndMilestones.name: Near Completion
timelineAndMilestones.note: Final finishes applied and handover preparation underway.

timelineAndMilestones.name: Public Opening
timelineAndMilestones.note: The new facility opened to the public.

executionDetails: MH Construction managed the full interior remodel on an eight-month schedule, coordinating architectural intent, demolition sequencing, and multi-trade execution from framing through finishes.
outcomesAndImpact: Delivered 38,000 square feet of purpose-built healthcare space
Added 10,000 square feet to LCSNW operational footprint
Consolidated two Kennewick offices into one service hub
Built a facility planned to support more than 400 local youth annually
Supported operations for approximately 120 local staff

clientTestimonial.quote: Life transformation is our daily work. Building transformation is something we entrust to others. Thanks to MH Construction for doing the heavy lifting at our new site in the #tricitieswa. We plan to move in this summer.
